# Success Story

## Summary

After switching to an audit-first workflow, UI changes became smaller, more targeted, and less likely to be reverted.

## What Improved

- Existing components were evaluated before new ones were proposed.
- Redundant metrics and extra CTA blocks were avoided.
- Pages kept their intended density and tone.
- Design work focused on genuine gaps instead of speculative additions.

## Result

The workflow produced fewer but better UI changes, with stronger alignment between product intent and final implementation.
